project_area: Specialty crops (vegetables, fruits, nuts, trees, honey, sweet corn, etc.) with a focus on improving nutrition knowledge, consumption, efficiency, and reducing costs in distribution systems
demographic_requirements: Benefits all entities in the specialty crop distribution chain, including small farmers, packers, and producers
eligibility_summary: Open to single organizations, institutions, individuals, small farmers, packers, and producers in New Jersey. Projects must have measurable outcomes benefiting the public or specialty crop industry, with a focus on nutrition education, efficiency improvements, or cost reduction in distribution systems.
